ddls:
CREATE TABLE "climate_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each climate data entry */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year of the recorded climate data */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region of the climate data */,
  "temp_avg" REAL /* Average temperature for the year */,
  "temp_min" REAL /* Minimum temperature for the year */,
  "temp_max" REAL /* Maximum temperature for the year */,
  "humidity_avg" REAL /* Average humidity for the year */,
  "humidity_min" REAL /* Minimum humidity for the year */,
  "humidity_max" REAL /* Maximum humidity for the year */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes about the climate data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year of the climate data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., United States, United Kingdom) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., Satellite Data, Ground Stations) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climate_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each climate metric */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the climate data */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the climate metric (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the climate metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_metrics_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES climate_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each upload record */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year of the data uploaded */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of the data */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was uploaded */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the uploaded file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the uploaded file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the climate data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES climate_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analysis_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the analysis conducted in the report */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File name of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view, download, edit) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission assigned to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)
